text:
There once was a girl named Ella. She loved adventures. One day she went out into the forest.

She climbed a big oak tree. Then she discovered a turtle.

The turtle was hers. She took it home. It was soft.

Every afternoon she took her turtle to the park.

One day the big bad owl stole the turtle. The big bad owl didn’y know she liked turtles.

Ella searched. She found the turtle. She took it back.

That night an owl swooped down. It couldn’t take her turtle.

But an owl likes a girl with a turtle. That kind of owl takes a girl home sometimes.

A year went by. They were twins.

They flew into the moon. Both loved owls.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
